calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Marilyn Cichor is present.
Attorney, Johnathan Black is spcially appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michael Pound is present and appearing with Limited Scope Attorney.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of September 24, 2012 is vacated.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Continued To Sep-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Continued To Sep-19-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Marilyn Cichor is not present.
Attorney Jonathan Black appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michael Pound is present.
Attorney Josephine Alioto representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsel notified court that plaintiff is hospitalized and parties agreed to continue settlement conference to 09-19-12 and trial date continued to 09-24-12. Notice waived. (D501)
